## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential SEO and content marketing partnership between Zencastr and GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zencastr, a leading podcast creation platform, seeks to leverage its strong domain authority and backlink profile for SEO growth](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-powered content creation services, with plans starting at $9k/mo for 25 articles or $12k/mo for 100 programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs' end-to-end process includes keyword research, content briefs, and publishing, with a focus on high-quality, targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Zencastr's CEO Adrian expressed interest in moving forward, requesting contract details for review](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

## Topics

### Zencastr Background and SEO Opportunity

  - [Founded in 2016, initially for remote musician collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Now a leading podcast creation platform used by top podcasters (e.g., Tim Ferriss, Sam Harris)](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Strong domain authority with \~1 million backlinks, mostly aged](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [No dedicated marketing function; growth has been organic/word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [CEO Adrian sees untapped SEO potential, especially with old but still-ranking content](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### GrowthX Labs' AI-Powered Content Creation Process

  - [250-step workflow utilizing LLMs for research, outlines, and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Human oversight for quality control and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Integration with various APIs (e.g., SEMrush, HVIP) for comprehensive data](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Customizable outputs (e.g., internal linking, CTAs, audience segmentation)](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Case studies: Reddit, Ramp, Hey - demonstrating significant traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Highlighted importance of updating old content](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Tool: SEO Testing for analyzing Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Case study: 10x improvement in impressions for refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Potential for reversing downward traffic trends (e.g., Steadily case study: 3k to 120k monthly visits in 12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### GrowthX Labs Service Offerings

  - [Editorial plan: $9k/mo for 25 articles (5k words) per month](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO plan: $12k/mo for 100 pages per month](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Both plans include full-service team (writers, editors, strategists)](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Additional services: technical SEO, schema markup, domain migrations](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

### Timeline and Results

  - [Indexing typically occurs within days for aged domains](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Clicks start appearing within 2-3 weeks of content production](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Results vary based on keyword difficulty, domain authority, and content type](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to send contract for Zencastr's finance/legal team review](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [90-day pilot period offered as initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Potential start date in March (2-week booking delay)](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Zencastr CEO to discuss with co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to add Zencastr team to Slack channel for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/sNvwFyNzjB9ohfx1FsKB9BBZN2K9VVPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
